---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What I'm trying to do

One sentence about the use case, not the solution.

## What I tried

Existing features I tried and why they didn't solve it.

## What would make this possible

The specific capability you're asking for. Feel free to propose the API shape.

## How often I'd use it

Roughly: "every request", "one per deploy", "once a month", etc. This helps us prioritize.

## Is there a workaround I should know about?

If you've found one, say so — it helps future people who search for this.
